repositories.prompt_note: Use the arc-forge-console source tree and current main branch. Review console, auth, billing, and customer-facing workflow changes conservatively during bootstrap. Keep issues and pull requests open unless certainly implemented on main.

Use the Arc Forge ClawSweeper source tree and current main branch. During bootstrap, review automation and workflow changes conservatively and keep issues and pull requests open unless certainly implemented on main.

generic_fallbacks.prompt_note: Use the {target_repo} source tree and current default branch. This repository is using the generic OpenClaw onboarding profile, so keep review conservative: issues and pull requests may be auto-closed only when the exact change is certainly already implemented on the default branch; pull requests may also be age-gated mostly implemented there.

Use the {target_repo} source tree and current default branch. This repository is using the generic personal-repository onboarding profile, so review conservatively and do not auto-close issues or pull requests unless a repository-specific profile later enables that policy.

Use the {target_repo} source tree and current default branch. This repository uses the conservative Arc Forge onboarding profile: review and durable comments only; do not auto-close issues or pull requests unless a repository-specific profile later enables that policy.

Use the {target_repo} source tree and current default branch. This repository uses the conservative IAMSamuelRodda onboarding profile: review and durable comments only; do not auto-close issues or pull requests unless a repository-specific profile later enables that policy.
